rdfs:label: Portfolio, Program & Project Management Module - OAA v5.0.0
rdfs:comment: Core PPM module for managing portfolios, programs, and projects with PBS/WBS. v5.0.0 adds Three Voices portfolio selection framework (VoC, VoP, VoB) for initiative ranking and resource allocation. Imports L6S ontologies for VoC/VoP data.

oaa:imports.name: EFS-ONT
oaa:imports.description: Enterprise Framework Services providing Epic and Feature entities for project-to-backlog traceability

oaa:imports.name: VOC-ONT
oaa:imports.description: Voice of Customer data for VoC scoring in Three Voices framework

oaa:imports.name: VSM-ONT
oaa:imports.description: Value Stream Mapping metrics for VoP scoring

oaa:imports.name: VANA-ONT
oaa:imports.description: Value-Add Analysis metrics for VoP scoring

oaa:imports.name: DMAIC-ONT
oaa:imports.description: DMAIC process capability for VoP scoring

entities.rdfs:label: Organisation
entities.rdfs:comment: A legal entity or business unit that participates in the platform ecosystem.
entities.oaa:description: The root entity representing a legal entity or business unit that participates in the platform ecosystem. Supports four organization types: platform_owner, client, agency, affiliate. Every PPM entity must belong to an organisation. Localization settings applied via ppm_localization_bridge (not embedded). Organizations establish strategic objectives and allocate resources across their portfolio of investments.

oaa:properties.name: org_id
oaa:properties.description: Unique identifier for the organisation (UUID format)

oaa:properties.name: org_name
oaa:properties.description: Official name of the organisation

oaa:properties.name: legal_name
oaa:properties.description: Full legal name including entity type (Ltd, Corp, etc.)

oaa:properties.name: org_type
oaa:properties.description: Organization's role in the platform ecosystem

oaa:properties.name: parent_org_id
oaa:properties.description: Parent organisation for hierarchical structures (UUID format)

oaa:properties.name: industry_sector
oaa:properties.description: Primary industry or sector

oaa:properties.name: description
oaa:properties.description: Brief description of organization and its purpose

oaa:properties.name: url
oaa:properties.description: Primary website URL

oaa:properties.name: address
oaa:properties.description: Physical address (format determined by localization_bridge)

oaa:properties.name: employee_count
oaa:properties.description: Number of employees

oaa:properties.name: annual_revenue_usd
oaa:properties.description: Annual revenue stored in USD base currency. Display currency via localization_bridge.

oaa:properties.name: ppm_maturity_level
oaa:properties.description: PMI/APM maturity assessment level (1-5 scale)

oaa:properties.name: governance_framework
oaa:properties.description: Governance framework used (e.g., APM, PMBOK, PRINCE2)

oaa:properties.name: status
oaa:properties.description: Current operational status of the organisation

oaa:properties.name: localization_bridge_refs
oaa:properties.description: References to localization configurations via bridge relationships

entities.rdfs:label: Portfolio
entities.rdfs:comment: A collection of programmes, projects, and operational activities grouped together to facilitate effective management.
entities.oaa:description: A collection of programmes, projects, and operational activities grouped together to facilitate effective management and achieve strategic business objectives. Portfolios align organizational strategy with execution and optimize resource allocation across initiatives. Portfolios inherit localization from parent organisation unless explicitly overridden via bridge relationship.

oaa:properties.name: portfolio_id
oaa:properties.description: Unique identifier for the portfolio (UUID format)

oaa:properties.name: portfolio_name
oaa:properties.description: Name of the portfolio

oaa:properties.name: org_id
oaa:properties.description: Reference to owning organisation (UUID format)

oaa:properties.name: description
oaa:properties.description: Detailed description of the portfolio and its strategic purpose

oaa:properties.name: strategic_objectives
oaa:properties.description: Strategic objectives this portfolio addresses

oaa:properties.name: budget_usd
oaa:properties.description: Total portfolio budget in USD base currency

oaa:properties.name: status
oaa:properties.description: Current lifecycle status of the portfolio

entities.rdfs:label: Programme
entities.rdfs:comment: A group of related projects managed in a coordinated manner to obtain benefits.
entities.oaa:description: A group of related projects, subsidiary programmes, and programme activities managed in a coordinated manner to obtain benefits not available from managing them individually. Programmes deliver transformational change and realize strategic benefits through coordinated project delivery. Programmes bridge strategic intent (portfolio) with tactical execution (projects). Localization cascades from portfolio unless overridden.

oaa:properties.name: programme_id
oaa:properties.description: Unique identifier for the programme (UUID format)

oaa:properties.name: programme_name
oaa:properties.description: Name of the programme

oaa:properties.name: portfolio_id
oaa:properties.description: Reference to parent portfolio (UUID format)

oaa:properties.name: description
oaa:properties.description: Detailed description of the programme and its benefits

oaa:properties.name: expected_benefits
oaa:properties.description: List of expected benefits from the programme

oaa:properties.name: budget_usd
oaa:properties.description: Total programme budget in USD base currency

oaa:properties.name: start_date
oaa:properties.description: Programme start date (ISO 8601 format)

oaa:properties.name: end_date
oaa:properties.description: Programme end date (ISO 8601 format)

oaa:properties.name: status
oaa:properties.description: Current lifecycle status of the programme

entities.rdfs:label: Project
entities.rdfs:comment: A temporary endeavour undertaken to create a unique product, service, or result.
entities.oaa:description: A temporary endeavour undertaken to create a unique product, service, or result with defined beginning and end dates, specific objectives, and constrained resources. Projects are the primary execution vehicle for delivering specific outputs within time, cost, and quality constraints. Projects are the lowest level in the PPM hierarchy where actual work is performed. Can have independent PBS and WBS. Localization can be overridden at project level for multi-regional delivery.

oaa:properties.name: project_id
oaa:properties.description: Unique identifier for the project (UUID format)

oaa:properties.name: project_name
oaa:properties.description: Name of the project

oaa:properties.name: programme_id
oaa:properties.description: Reference to parent programme (UUID format, optional for standalone projects)

oaa:properties.name: org_id
oaa:properties.description: Reference to owning organisation (UUID format)

oaa:properties.name: description
oaa:properties.description: Detailed description of the project objectives and scope

oaa:properties.name: budget_usd
oaa:properties.description: Total project budget in USD base currency

oaa:properties.name: start_date
oaa:properties.description: Project start date (ISO 8601 format)

oaa:properties.name: end_date
oaa:properties.description: Project end date (ISO 8601 format)

oaa:properties.name: status
oaa:properties.description: Current lifecycle status of the project

oaa:properties.name: project_manager_id
oaa:properties.description: Reference to project manager stakeholder (UUID format)

entities.rdfs:label: Product Breakdown Structure
entities.rdfs:comment: A hierarchical decomposition defining WHAT will be delivered.
entities.oaa:description: Product Breakdown Structure - A hierarchical decomposition defining WHAT will be delivered. Can represent: (1) Products marketed by Platform Owner, (2) Products/services marketed by Client organization, OR (3) Deliverables from PPM projects. Independent of HOW work is organized (see WBS). PBS defines product structure, deliverables hierarchy, and output organization. Supports product discovery, marketing, and project deliverable definition across platform owner and client contexts.

oaa:properties.name: pbs_id
oaa:properties.description: Unique identifier for PBS node (UUID format)

oaa:properties.name: pbs_name
oaa:properties.description: Name of product/deliverable component

oaa:properties.name: pbs_code
oaa:properties.description: Hierarchical code (e.g., 1.2.3 for Product > Module > Component)

oaa:properties.name: parent_pbs_id
oaa:properties.description: Parent PBS node for hierarchical structure (UUID format)

oaa:properties.name: org_id
oaa:properties.description: Organization that owns this PBS (platform_owner or client)

oaa:properties.name: pbs_type
oaa:properties.description: Type of PBS node

oaa:properties.name: platform_product_id
oaa:properties.description: Link to platform product (if PBS represents platform offering)

oaa:properties.name: client_product_id
oaa:properties.description: Link to client's marketed product (if PBS represents client offering)

oaa:properties.name: project_id
oaa:properties.description: Link to PPM project (if PBS represents project deliverable)

oaa:properties.name: description
oaa:properties.description: Detailed description of product/deliverable

oaa:properties.name: acceptance_criteria
oaa:properties.description: Criteria for accepting this deliverable

oaa:properties.name: status
oaa:properties.description: Current status of the PBS component

oaa:properties.name: version
oaa:properties.description: Version of this PBS component (semantic versioning)

oaa:properties.name: estimated_value_usd
oaa:properties.description: Estimated value in USD base currency

entities.rdfs:label: Work Breakdown Structure
entities.rdfs:comment: A hierarchical decomposition defining HOW work will be organized and executed.
entities.oaa:description: Work Breakdown Structure - A hierarchical decomposition defining HOW work will be organized and executed by the organization. Specific to the organization performing the work (platform_owner, client, agency, or affiliate). Defines work organization, not deliverables (see PBS for deliverables). WBS enables effort estimation, supports scheduling and resource allocation. Each organization maintains their own WBS for work they perform. Supports distributed and multi-organizational project delivery.

oaa:properties.name: wbs_id
oaa:properties.description: Unique identifier for WBS node (UUID format)

oaa:properties.name: wbs_name
oaa:properties.description: Name of work package or activity (action-oriented)

oaa:properties.name: wbs_code
oaa:properties.description: Hierarchical code (e.g., 1.2.3 for Phase > Activity > Task)

oaa:properties.name: parent_wbs_id
oaa:properties.description: Parent WBS node for hierarchical work decomposition (UUID format)

oaa:properties.name: org_id
oaa:properties.description: Organization performing this work (owner of WBS)

oaa:properties.name: project_id
oaa:properties.description: Link to PPM project (if WBS is project-specific)

oaa:properties.name: wbs_type
oaa:properties.description: Type of WBS node

oaa:properties.name: description
oaa:properties.description: Detailed description of work to be performed

oaa:properties.name: deliverable_pbs_id
oaa:properties.description: Link to PBS deliverable this work produces

oaa:properties.name: assigned_to
oaa:properties.description: Stakeholder assigned to this work package

oaa:properties.name: estimated_effort_hours
oaa:properties.description: Estimated effort in hours

oaa:properties.name: actual_effort_hours
oaa:properties.description: Actual effort spent in hours

oaa:properties.name: estimated_duration_days
oaa:properties.description: Estimated duration in working days

oaa:properties.name: planned_start_date
oaa:properties.description: Planned start date (ISO 8601 format)

oaa:properties.name: planned_end_date
oaa:properties.description: Planned end date (ISO 8601 format)

oaa:properties.name: status
oaa:properties.description: Current status of the work package

oaa:properties.name: completion_percentage
oaa:properties.description: Work completion percentage (0-100)

oaa:properties.name: estimated_cost_usd
oaa:properties.description: Estimated cost in USD base currency

oaa:properties.name: actual_cost_usd
oaa:properties.description: Actual cost in USD base currency

entities.rdfs:label: Stakeholder
entities.rdfs:comment: An individual, group, or organisation that may affect or be affected by PPM activities.
entities.oaa:description: An individual, group, or organisation that may affect, be affected by, or perceive itself to be affected by a decision, activity, or outcome of a portfolio, programme, or project. Stakeholders have varying levels of authority, interest, and influence in PPM activities and outcomes. Stakeholders are linked to PPM entities through roles and RACI assignments. Can have personal localization preferences that override organizational defaults.

oaa:properties.name: stakeholder_id
oaa:properties.description: Unique identifier for the stakeholder (UUID format)

oaa:properties.name: name
oaa:properties.description: Full name of the stakeholder

oaa:properties.name: email
oaa:properties.description: Email address

oaa:properties.name: org_id
oaa:properties.description: Reference to stakeholder's organisation (UUID format)

oaa:properties.name: role
oaa:properties.description: Role or job title within the organisation

oaa:properties.name: influence_level
oaa:properties.description: Level of influence on PPM outcomes

oaa:properties.name: interest_level
oaa:properties.description: Level of interest in PPM activities

oaa:properties.name: status
oaa:properties.description: Current status of the stakeholder

relationships.rdfs:label: belongs to
relationships.rdfs:comment: A Portfolio belongs to an Organisation

relationships.rdfs:label: has portfolio
relationships.rdfs:comment: An Organisation has one or more Portfolios

relationships.rdfs:label: contains programme
relationships.rdfs:comment: A Portfolio contains one or more Programmes

relationships.rdfs:label: part of portfolio
relationships.rdfs:comment: A Programme is part of a Portfolio

relationships.rdfs:label: contains project
relationships.rdfs:comment: A Programme contains one or more Projects

relationships.rdfs:label: part of programme
relationships.rdfs:comment: A Project is part of a Programme

relationships.rdfs:label: owned by
relationships.rdfs:comment: A Project is owned by an Organisation

relationships.rdfs:label: owns project
relationships.rdfs:comment: An Organisation owns Projects

relationships.rdfs:label: has PBS
relationships.rdfs:comment: A Project has one or more Product Breakdown Structures

relationships.rdfs:label: delivers for
relationships.rdfs:comment: A PBS delivers for a Project

relationships.rdfs:label: has WBS
relationships.rdfs:comment: A Project has one or more Work Breakdown Structures

relationships.rdfs:label: works on
relationships.rdfs:comment: A WBS works on a Project

relationships.rdfs:label: produces deliverable
relationships.rdfs:comment: A WBS work package produces a PBS deliverable

relationships.rdfs:label: produced by
relationships.rdfs:comment: A PBS deliverable is produced by WBS work packages

relationships.rdfs:label: assigned to
relationships.rdfs:comment: A WBS work package is assigned to a Stakeholder

relationships.rdfs:label: has assignment
relationships.rdfs:comment: A Stakeholder has WBS work assignments

relationships.rdfs:label: employs
relationships.rdfs:comment: An Organisation employs Stakeholders

relationships.rdfs:label: employed by
relationships.rdfs:comment: A Stakeholder is employed by an Organisation

relationships.rdfs:label: owns PBS
relationships.rdfs:comment: An Organisation owns PBS components

relationships.rdfs:label: PBS owned by
relationships.rdfs:comment: A PBS is owned by an Organisation

relationships.rdfs:label: performs WBS
relationships.rdfs:comment: An Organisation performs WBS work

relationships.rdfs:label: performed by
relationships.rdfs:comment: A WBS is performed by an Organisation

relationships.rdfs:label: has parent org
relationships.rdfs:comment: An Organisation has a parent Organisation (hierarchical)

relationships.rdfs:label: has child org
relationships.rdfs:comment: An Organisation has child Organisations (hierarchical)

relationships.rdfs:label: has parent PBS
relationships.rdfs:comment: A PBS has a parent PBS (hierarchical decomposition)

relationships.rdfs:label: has child PBS
relationships.rdfs:comment: A PBS has child PBS components (hierarchical decomposition)

relationships.rdfs:label: has parent WBS
relationships.rdfs:comment: A WBS has a parent WBS (hierarchical work decomposition)

relationships.rdfs:label: has child WBS
relationships.rdfs:comment: A WBS has child WBS work packages (hierarchical work decomposition)

relationships.rdfs:label: delivers epic
relationships.rdfs:comment: A Project delivers an EFS Epic — the project's delivery scope includes this epic from the product backlog. Bridges PPM delivery governance to EFS product scope.

relationships.rdfs:label: gates release
relationships.rdfs:comment: A WBS milestone gates a release — the milestone must be reached before the release can proceed. Links PPM temporal governance to software release management.

relationships.rdfs:label: decomposes feature
relationships.rdfs:comment: A WBS work package decomposes an EFS Feature into executable work. Links PPM work organisation to product feature decomposition.

businessRules.name: Organisation Required for All Entities
businessRules.condition: IF Entity is Portfolio, Programme, Project, PBS, WBS, or Stakeholder
businessRules.action: THEN Entity.org_id MUST reference a valid Organisation
businessRules.message: Every PPM entity must belong to an organisation

businessRules.name: Valid Org Type
businessRules.action: THEN Organisation.org_type MUST be one of: platform_owner, client, agency, affiliate
businessRules.message: Organisation type must be a valid enum value

businessRules.name: Programme Requires Portfolio
businessRules.action: THEN Programme.portfolio_id MUST reference a valid Portfolio
businessRules.message: Every programme must belong to a portfolio

businessRules.name: PBS Type Consistency
businessRules.message: Platform product PBS should link to platform product catalog

businessRules.name: WBS Effort Estimate Range
businessRules.action: THEN WBS.estimated_effort_hours SHOULD be between 8 and 80
businessRules.message: Work packages should be decomposed to 8-80 hour range for effective management

businessRules.name: Financial Values in USD
businessRules.condition: IF financial field (budget, cost, revenue) is set
businessRules.action: THEN field name MUST end with _usd suffix and value MUST be in USD base currency
businessRules.message: All financial values must be stored in USD base currency

businessRules.name: Dates in ISO 8601
businessRules.action: THEN value MUST be in ISO 8601 format with timezone
businessRules.message: All dates must be stored in ISO 8601 format

businessRules.name: No Circular PBS Hierarchy
businessRules.action: THEN PBS hierarchy MUST NOT contain circular references
businessRules.message: PBS hierarchy cannot have circular dependencies

businessRules.name: No Circular WBS Hierarchy
businessRules.action: THEN WBS hierarchy MUST NOT contain circular references
businessRules.message: WBS hierarchy cannot have circular dependencies

businessRules.name: Localization Via Bridge
businessRules.action: THEN localization MUST be applied via localization_bridge_refs, NOT embedded fields
businessRules.message: Localization must be handled via bridge relationships to Localization Module

threeVoicesEntities.rdfs:label: Voice of Customer
threeVoicesEntities.rdfs:comment: Customer satisfaction, CTQ compliance, and need priority assessment for a portfolio initiative. Aggregates VoC data from VOC-ONT into a scoring input for Three Voices portfolio selection.

oaa:properties.name: vocAssessmentId
oaa:properties.description: Unique assessment identifier

oaa:properties.name: initiativeRef
oaa:properties.description: Reference to ppm:Project or ppm:Programme being assessed

oaa:properties.name: ctqCount
oaa:properties.description: Number of CTQ specifications this initiative addresses

oaa:properties.name: ctqComplianceRate
oaa:properties.description: Percentage of CTQ specs currently met (0-100)

oaa:properties.name: needPriorityScore
oaa:properties.description: Weighted need priority score from VoC analysis (0-10)

oaa:properties.name: gapScoreAvg
oaa:properties.description: Average gap score across customer needs addressed

oaa:properties.name: evidenceStrength
oaa:properties.description: Strength of VoC evidence supporting the assessment

oaa:properties.name: kanoAlignment
oaa:properties.description: Dominant Kano category: MustBe/Performance/Attractive

oaa:properties.name: vocWeight
oaa:properties.description: Weight in Three Voices composite score (default 35%)

threeVoicesEntities.rdfs:label: Voice of Process
threeVoicesEntities.rdfs:comment: Process readiness, efficiency, capability, and stability assessment for a portfolio initiative. Aggregates L6S data from VSM-ONT, VANA-ONT, DMAIC-ONT into a scoring input for Three Voices portfolio selection.

oaa:properties.name: vopAssessmentId
oaa:properties.description: Unique assessment identifier

oaa:properties.name: initiativeRef
oaa:properties.description: Reference to ppm:Project or ppm:Programme being assessed

oaa:properties.name: processReadiness
oaa:properties.description: Overall process readiness for initiative delivery

oaa:properties.name: vaRatio
oaa:properties.description: Value-added ratio from VSM (0-1.0)

oaa:properties.name: sigmaBaseline
oaa:properties.description: Current sigma level from DMAIC capability analysis

oaa:properties.name: copqImpact
oaa:properties.description: COPQ as percentage of revenue

oaa:properties.name: capacityUtilisation
oaa:properties.description: Current capacity utilisation percentage (0-100)

oaa:properties.name: bottleneckRefs
oaa:properties.description: References to identified bottleneck steps

oaa:properties.name: wasteImpactAreas
oaa:properties.description: DOWNTIME waste categories with highest impact

oaa:properties.name: spcSignalCount
oaa:properties.description: Number of SPC out-of-control signals in assessment period

oaa:properties.name: vopWeight
oaa:properties.description: Weight in Three Voices composite score (default 25%)

threeVoicesEntities.rdfs:label: Voice of Business
threeVoicesEntities.rdfs:comment: Business impact, financial return, and strategic alignment assessment for a portfolio initiative. Independent of L6S — draws from VP/KPI/BSC data.

oaa:properties.name: vobAssessmentId
oaa:properties.description: Unique assessment identifier

oaa:properties.name: initiativeRef
oaa:properties.description: Reference to ppm:Project or ppm:Programme being assessed

oaa:properties.name: strategicAlignmentScore
oaa:properties.description: Alignment to VSOM strategy objectives (0-10)

oaa:properties.name: financialReturn
oaa:properties.description: Expected financial return (NPV or ROI)

oaa:properties.name: revenueImpact
oaa:properties.description: Projected revenue impact

oaa:properties.name: costReduction
oaa:properties.description: Projected cost reduction

oaa:properties.name: riskScore
oaa:properties.description: Delivery risk score (0-10, lower is better)

oaa:properties.name: bscPerspectiveAlignment
oaa:properties.description: BSC perspectives this initiative serves

oaa:properties.name: kpiTargetCount
oaa:properties.description: Number of KPIs this initiative targets

oaa:properties.name: vobWeight
oaa:properties.description: Weight in Three Voices composite score (default 40%)

threeVoicesEntities.rdfs:label: Three Voices Composite Score
threeVoicesEntities.rdfs:comment: Composite portfolio selection score combining VoB (40%), VoC (35%), and VoP (25%) for initiative ranking. Used by pfc-ppm-select skill for portfolio prioritisation.

oaa:properties.name: scoreId
oaa:properties.description: Unique score identifier

oaa:properties.name: initiativeRef
oaa:properties.description: Reference to ppm:Project or ppm:Programme being scored

oaa:properties.name: vocScore
oaa:properties.description: Normalised VoC score (0-10)

oaa:properties.name: vopScore
oaa:properties.description: Normalised VoP score (0-10)

oaa:properties.name: vobScore
oaa:properties.description: Normalised VoB score (0-10)

oaa:properties.name: compositeScore
oaa:properties.description: Weighted composite: (vobScore × vobWeight) + (vocScore × vocWeight) + (vopScore × vopWeight)

oaa:properties.name: rank
oaa:properties.description: Portfolio rank (1 = highest priority)

oaa:properties.name: recommendation
oaa:properties.description: Investment recommendation based on composite score

oaa:properties.name: selectionCycleRef
oaa:properties.description: Reference to the portfolio selection cycle

threeVoicesEntities.rdfs:label: Portfolio Selection Cycle
threeVoicesEntities.rdfs:comment: A periodic portfolio selection and ranking exercise using the Three Voices framework. Typically quarterly. Produces ranked initiative list with investment recommendations.

oaa:properties.name: cycleId
oaa:properties.description: Unique cycle identifier

oaa:properties.name: cycleName
oaa:properties.description: e.g. 'Q2 2026 Portfolio Selection'

oaa:properties.name: portfolioRef
oaa:properties.description: Reference to ppm:Portfolio being evaluated

oaa:properties.name: initiativeCount
oaa:properties.description: Number of initiatives assessed

oaa:properties.name: vocWeightOverride
oaa:properties.description: Override default VoC weight if custom weighting

oaa:properties.name: vopWeightOverride
oaa:properties.description: Override default VoP weight if custom weighting

oaa:properties.name: vobWeightOverride
oaa:properties.description: Override default VoB weight if custom weighting

oaa:properties.name: budgetConstraint
oaa:properties.description: Total budget available for investment

oaa:properties.name: resourceConstraint
oaa:properties.description: Total FTEs available

oaa:properties.name: approvedBy
oaa:properties.description: Executive approver

threeVoicesEntities.rdfs:label: Initiative Candidate
threeVoicesEntities.rdfs:comment: A candidate initiative (project or programme) submitted for portfolio selection. Links to its Three Voices assessments and final composite score.

oaa:properties.name: candidateId
oaa:properties.description: Unique candidate identifier

oaa:properties.name: initiativeRef
oaa:properties.description: Reference to ppm:Project or ppm:Programme

oaa:properties.name: selectionCycleRef
oaa:properties.description: Reference to ppm:PortfolioSelectionCycle

oaa:properties.name: vocAssessmentRef
oaa:properties.description: Reference to ppm:VoiceOfCustomer assessment

oaa:properties.name: vopAssessmentRef
oaa:properties.description: Reference to ppm:VoiceOfProcess assessment

oaa:properties.name: vobAssessmentRef
oaa:properties.description: Reference to ppm:VoiceOfBusiness assessment

oaa:properties.name: threeVoicesScoreRef
oaa:properties.description: Reference to ppm:ThreeVoicesScore

threeVoicesBusinessRules.name: Three Voices Weight Sum
threeVoicesBusinessRules.action: THEN vocWeight + vopWeight + vobWeight MUST equal 1.0

threeVoicesBusinessRules.name: VoC Assessment Required
threeVoicesBusinessRules.condition: IF an InitiativeCandidate is submitted for a PortfolioSelectionCycle
threeVoicesBusinessRules.action: THEN vocAssessmentRef MUST be populated before scoring

threeVoicesBusinessRules.name: VoB Assessment Required
threeVoicesBusinessRules.condition: IF an InitiativeCandidate is submitted for a PortfolioSelectionCycle
threeVoicesBusinessRules.action: THEN vobAssessmentRef MUST be populated before scoring

threeVoicesBusinessRules.name: Composite Score Formula
threeVoicesBusinessRules.action: THEN compositeScore MUST equal (vobScore × vobWeight) + (vocScore × vocWeight) + (vopScore × vopWeight)

threeVoicesBusinessRules.name: Rank Uniqueness per Cycle
threeVoicesBusinessRules.condition: IF multiple ThreeVoicesScores exist for the same PortfolioSelectionCycle
threeVoicesBusinessRules.action: THEN rank values MUST be unique (no tied ranks without tiebreaker)

threeVoicesBusinessRules.name: Budget Constraint Enforcement
threeVoicesBusinessRules.action: THEN sum of approved initiative budgets MUST NOT exceed budgetConstraint

threeVoicesBusinessRules.name: VoP Optional but Advisory
threeVoicesBusinessRules.condition: IF an InitiativeCandidate has no VoP assessment
threeVoicesBusinessRules.action: THEN system SHOULD warn that process readiness is unknown — VoP score defaults to neutral (5.0)

threeVoicesBusinessRules.name: Investment Recommendation Thresholds
threeVoicesBusinessRules.condition: IF a ThreeVoicesScore compositeScore is calculated

threeVoicesJoinPatterns.name: VoC-to-Initiative Scoring
threeVoicesJoinPatterns.useCase: How does customer voice data influence initiative priority?

threeVoicesJoinPatterns.name: VoP-to-Initiative Scoring
threeVoicesJoinPatterns.useCase: How does process readiness influence initiative priority?

threeVoicesJoinPatterns.name: VoB-to-Initiative Scoring
threeVoicesJoinPatterns.useCase: How does strategic alignment influence initiative priority?

threeVoicesJoinPatterns.name: Portfolio Selection Pipeline
threeVoicesJoinPatterns.useCase: Which initiatives were selected in this cycle and what are their ranks?

threeVoicesJoinPatterns.name: L6S-to-VoP Bridge
threeVoicesJoinPatterns.useCase: How do L6S analysis results feed into portfolio selection?

threeVoicesJoinPatterns.name: Budget-Constrained Selection
threeVoicesJoinPatterns.useCase: Which initiatives fit within the budget constraint when ranked by composite score?

threeVoicesJoinPatterns.name: Recommendation-to-Action
threeVoicesJoinPatterns.useCase: What action should be taken for each initiative based on its recommendation?

threeVoicesJoinPatterns.name: Cross-Cycle Comparison
threeVoicesJoinPatterns.useCase: How has an initiative's priority changed between selection cycles?

changes: Added Three Voices portfolio selection framework (6 new entities: VoiceOfCustomer, VoiceOfProcess, VoiceOfBusiness, ThreeVoicesScore, PortfolioSelectionCycle, InitiativeCandidate)
Added 8 Three Voices business rules (rule-tv-001 through rule-tv-008)
Added 8 Three Voices join patterns (JP-TV-001 through JP-TV-008)
Added imports for VOC-ONT v1.0.0, VSM-ONT v1.0.0, VANA-ONT v1.0.0, DMAIC-ONT v2.0.0
Default Three Voices weights: VoB 40%, VoC 35%, VoP 25% (customisable per cycle)
